title: ExecutionSurface

pty.description: Whether the agent has access to a pseudo-terminal (interactive shell).

workdir.description: Absolute path of the working directory for this session.

background.description: Whether the agent runs as a background (non-interactive) process.

reviewOnly.description: When true, the agent may only read and report; it must not make changes.

worktreeStrategy.description: How git worktrees are managed for isolated edits.

sandboxMode.description: Isolation level applied to the agent process.

networkMode.description: Egress policy: none (offline), allowlist, or full internet.

egressAllowlist.description: Hostnames or CIDR blocks permitted when networkMode is 'allowlist'.

elevated.description: Whether the agent has elevated (e.g., sudo) privileges.

protectedPaths.description: Filesystem paths the agent must not read or modify.

approvalProfile.description: Optional URN of a human-approval profile for sensitive operations.

description: The set of execution-environment constraints for an agent session, specifying terminal mode, working directory, sandbox level, network access policy, protected file paths, and approval requirements.
